head.mass-1: With IQ Option you don’t have to be confined to the browser
head.last: Explore our applications to find those that better suit your lifestyle and trading needs.

mobile.head: IQ Option Mobile App
mobile.text: Top trading app in 28 countries! Feel the power of the financial market in the palm of your hand.

desk.head: IQ Option DESKTOP
desk.review: for OS X and Windows OS
desk.text: The standalone application works even faster! The smooth performance of IQ Option 4.0 you’re used to — without any web-browser clutter.

bott.text: Whether you favor trading on a widescreen or appreciate the flexibility of mobile devices - IQ Option has got you covered.
